title: Federal Health Advisory, Director
raw_jd:
Job Family:


Strategy \& Transformation Consulting  

Travel Required:


None  

Clearance Required:


Active Public Trust
What You Will Do:  

As a leader within the Guidehouse Federal Health Advisory practice, you will partner with clients to drive impactful transformations in support of the Department of Health and Human Services, Assistant Secretary for Financial Resources and other OPDIVS/Staffdivs.


You will be responsible for growing a book of business, building trusted client relationships, leading dynamic teams, and delivering transformative project results within HHS. You will oversee all aspects of the development and delivery of contracts and projects, ranging from organizational strategy, acquisition modernization, organizational design and development; operational and team efficiency; workforce and leadership development; and executive communication and change management.

  

This role involves leading multiple concurrent contracts and regularly interacting with executive\-level clients to ensure successful, high\-quality  

project delivery. Applicants should have extensive experience as a consulting leader and trusted advisor to public sector executives.


Job Description/Responsibilities


Client Relationship Management and Engagement Delivery  

Lead with Vision:

* Actively manage a similar portfolio of client engagements and consulting staff, ensuring all contractual requirements and deliverables are met.

  

Be a Strategic Partner:

* Strategize with consultant teams on project approach, facilitate communications, and manage risk across engagements.

  

Serve as a Trusted Advisor:

* Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with client executives.
* Be a Good Steward: Manage all aspects of project financials and deliver all projects on budget and on schedule.
* Champion Compliance: Maintain and promote compliance with contractual, regulatory, and internal policy requirements.


New Business Development:

* Drive Growth and Sales: Be personally engaged in and accountable for growing the practice at a rate of $5M\+ in annual new business for the firm. Serve as the lead executive for new business opportunities.

  

Pioneer Thought Leadership:

* Help build the Guidehouse brand across Federal Health clients by developing white papers, attending conferences, and creating solutions/methodologies.

  

Serve as a Subject Matter Expert:

* Serve as a content and domain expert for client organizational and leadership challenges, Facilitating high\-stakes meetings.

  

Consulting Staff Leadership

* Build Strong Teams: Provide direct line management for consultants assigned to owned client engagements.
* Help Grow Careers: Lead career development, advocacy for, recruitment of, and retention of members of the Federal Health
* Advisory team.
* Mentor and Coach Staff: Train and onboard new team members. Shape Team/Firm Culture: Provide a vision for developing and sustaining an authentic, collaborative, and performance oriented
* culture.

  

What You Will Need:

* Bachelor’s degree, preferably in public health, business administration, organizational development, or related fields.
* 12\+ years of professional experience, including industry or consulting experience, excluding internships, part\-time roles, co\-ops, fellowships, and academic research.
* 10\+ years of experience supporting commercial/federal health in a consultative capacity.
* Demonstrated ability to lead new business pursuits and proposals with proven results.
* Excellent program/project management skills with demonstrated experience leading multi\-disciplinary teams across a range of projects.
* Demonstrated ability to establish and maintain strong business relationships with senior executive clients.
* Well\-rounded leadership skills to provide strategic, analytical, and operational direction to teams.
* Ability to obtain a Public Trust clearance (i.e. US citizenship required)

  

What Would Be Nice To Have:

* Masters degree in Public Health Administration or similar degree.
* Experience in HHS acquisition processes and systems.
* Big 4 consulting and industry experience in areas related to large\-scale technology implementations, project/program management, organizational change management, data analytics, and strategic planning.

  

What We Offer:


Guidehouse offers a comprehensive, total rewards package that includes competitive compensation and a flexible benefits package that reflects our commitment to creating a diverse and supportive workplace.


Benefits include:

* Medical, Rx, Dental \& Vision Insurance
* Personal and Family Sick Time \& Company Paid Holidays
* Position may be eligible for a discretionary variable incentive bonus
* Parental Leave and Adoption Assistance
* 401(k) Retirement Plan
* Basic Life \& Supplemental Life
* Health Savings Account, Dental/Vision \& Dependent Care Flexible Spending Accounts
* Short\-Term \& Long\-Term Disability
* Student Loan PayDown
* Tuition Reimbursement, Personal Development \& Learning Opportunities
* Skills Development \& Certifications
* Employee Referral Program
* Corporate Sponsored Events \& Community Outreach
* Emergency Back\-Up Childcare Program
* Mobility Stipend


About Guidehouse


Guidehouse is an Equal Opportunity Employer–Protected Veterans, Individuals with Disabilities or any other basis protected by law, ordinance, or regulation.


Guidehouse will consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with the requirements of applicable law or ordinance including the Fair Chance Ordinance of Los Angeles and San Francisco.


If you have visited our website for information about employment opportunities, or to apply for a position, and you require an accommodation, please contact Guidehouse Recruiting at 1\-571\-633\-1711 or via email at RecruitingAccommodation@guidehouse.com. All information you provide will be kept confidential and will be used only to the extent required to provide needed reasonable accommodation.


All communication regarding recruitment for a Guidehouse position will be sent from Guidehouse email domains including @guidehouse.com or guidehouse@myworkday.com. Correspondence received by an applicant from any other domain should be considered unauthorized and will not be honored by Guidehouse. Note that Guidehouse will never charge a fee or require a money transfer at any stage of the recruitment process and does not collect fees from educational institutions for participation in a recruitment event. Never provide your banking information to a third party purporting to need that information to proceed in the hiring process.


If any person or organization demands money related to a job opportunity with Guidehouse, please report the matter to Guidehouse’s Ethics Hotline. If you want to check the validity of correspondence you have received, please contact recruiting@guidehouse.com. Guidehouse is not responsible for losses incurred (monetary or otherwise) from an applicant’s dealings with unauthorized third parties.


Guidehouse does not accept unsolicited resumes through or from search firms or staffing agencies. All unsolicited resumes will be considered the property of Guidehouse and Guidehouse will not be obligated to pay a placement fee.

score.skills_rationale: This is a management consulting role focused on organizational strategy and change management, which doesn't align with the candidate's technical data/analytics architecture background. While both involve working with executives and project delivery, the core competencies are completely different domains.
score.scope_rationale: The role requires 12+ years experience and $5M+ business development responsibility, which matches the candidate's seniority level. However, it demands consulting sales/BD experience and line management of consulting staff - areas not evident in the candidate's background focused on technical delivery roles.
score.pay_rationale: No salary range provided in the JD, making pay alignment impossible to assess.
red_flags: requires $5M+ annual new business development with no clear comp structure
vague job responsibilities with buzzword-heavy language
score.raw_analysis: This is a senior management consulting role at Guidehouse requiring extensive business development, client relationship management, and healthcare consulting expertise. The candidate's background is entirely in technical data/analytics roles with no consulting sales experience or healthcare domain knowledge. The role demands fundamentally different skills and career trajectory than the candidate's technical architecture background, making this a poor fit despite similar seniority levels.
